title: Seed Germination as Depth Traversal

seed_eml0.description: Dormant seed: EML-0 crystalline, metabolically arrested
seed_eml0.reason: Seed is EML-0: dormant, discrete, minimum entropy configuration

enzyme_activation.description: Water triggers enzymatic activation: EML-1 exponential
enzyme_activation.reason: Germination is EML-1: exponential enzyme cascade (amylase, protease activation)

gravity_statolith.description: Root measures gravity via statolith sedimentation: EML-2
gravity_statolith.reason: Gravitropism is EML-2: statolith position measurement determines growth direction

circumnutations.description: Shoot tip circumnutates: oscillatory spiral growth; EML-3
circumnutations.reason: Circumnutation is EML-3: oscillatory spiral tip movement searching for light/support

spring_plural.description: Spring: billions of seeds simultaneously traverse 0->1->2->3
spring_plural.reason: Spring theorem: seasonal mass depth traversal; entire biosphere shifts stratum
